events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist, Brian May, was born on July 19, 1947, in Hampton, Middlesex, United Kingdom.

angles.name: Brian May's Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 79th birthday to the iconic Queen guitarist, Brian May! What's your favourite May riff or solo?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: Sir Michael Philip Jagger, lead singer and co-founder of The Rolling Stones, was born on July 26, 1943, in Dartford, Kent.

angles.name: Mick Jagger's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 83rd birthday to the legendary frontman of The Rolling Stones, Mick Jagger! Still got the moves.

events.title: MTV launched with 'Video Killed The Radio Star'
events.blurb: On August 1, 1981, MTV launched in the United States, famously kicking off with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star'.

angles.name: MTV Launch
angles.copy: 45 years ago today, MTV changed music forever! Remember the very first video ever played? The Buggles knew what was coming.

events.title: Oasis released 'Definitely Maybe'
events.blurb: Oasis released their seminal debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29, 1994, which quickly became the fastest-selling debut album in British history.

angles.name: Definitely Maybe Anniversary
angles.copy: It's 32 years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe'! What's your top track from their iconic debut?

events.title: Woodstock Festival began
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music and Art Fair took place from August 15 to 18, 1969, on a dairy farm in Bethel, New York, drawing over 400,000 attendees.

angles.name: Woodstock Anniversary
angles.copy: 57 years ago today, the Woodstock Festival began! Three days of peace, love, and iconic music that defined a generation.

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's passing
events.blurb: August 16, 2026, marks 49 years since the death of the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, who passed away in 1977.

angles.name: Elvis Death Anniversary
angles.copy: Remembering the King today. It's 49 years since we lost Elvis Presley, but his music and legacy live on.

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's passing
events.blurb: September 18, 2026, marks 56 years since the death of guitar legend Jimi Hendrix, who passed away in 1970.

angles.name: Jimi Hendrix Anniversary
angles.copy: Remembering the unparalleled genius of Jimi Hendrix, 56 years after his passing. His guitar wizardry remains unmatched.

events.title: The Beatles released 'Abbey Road'
events.blurb: The Beatles released their eleventh studio album, 'Abbey Road', on September 26, 1969, featuring iconic tracks like 'Come Together' and 'Here Comes the Sun'.

angles.name: Abbey Road Anniversary
angles.copy: 57 years ago, The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. The album cover alone is legendary, let alone the tunes!

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: Christine Ellen Hynde, lead singer of The Pretenders, was born on September 7, 1951, in Akron, Ohio.

angles.name: Chrissie Hynde's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the incomparable Chrissie Hynde! Her voice and attitude with The Pretenders are still pure rock and roll.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: William John Paul Gallagher, lead singer of Oasis and later Beady Eye, was born on September 21, 1972, in Manchester, England.

angles.name: Liam Gallagher's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! Still bringing the swagger and the tunes. What's your favourite Oasis track with him on vocals?

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' released (UK single)
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic peace anthem 'Imagine' was released as a single in the UK in October 1975.

angles.name: Imagine Anniversary
angles.copy: 51 years since John Lennon released 'Imagine' as a single in the UK. A song that still resonates with hope and peace.

events.title: Apple released the first iPod
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the first-generation iPod on October 23, 2001, revolutionising portable music with '1,000 songs in your pocket'.

angles.name: iPod Anniversary
angles.copy: Remember this? 25 years ago, Apple dropped the original iPod and changed how we listen to music forever. What was the first song you loaded onto yours?

events.title: Happy James Bond Day!
events.blurb: October 5th is celebrated annually as James Bond Day, marking the anniversary of the world premiere of the first Bond film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: James Bond Day
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Who's your favourite Bond, and what's the ultimate Bond theme tune? Let us know!

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: John Winston Ono Lennon, co-founder of The Beatles and an iconic solo artist, was born on October 9, 1940, in Liverpool.

angles.name: John Lennon's Birthday
angles.copy: Remembering John Lennon, who would have been 86 today. His music and message of peace continue to inspire.

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: English actor, comedian, and screenwriter John Marwood Cleese was born on October 27, 1939, in Weston-super-Mare, Somerset.

angles.name: John Cleese's Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 87th birthday to the legendary John Cleese! From Monty Python to Fawlty Towers, a true British comedy icon.
